title: Unkawa's Server Optimization
description: A small modpack that optimizes your server!
body:
# This is my personal server optimization modpack! 

You can use this small Modpack to optimize your server, it can be either Aternos or any Server you have!
It can also be used in your Client!

This is the Modlist!
1. [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunky) by [Pop4959](https://modrinth.com/user/pop4959)
2. [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) by [Jaredlll08](https://modrinth.com/user/jaredlll08)
3. [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) by [Ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland) &  [Duplexsystem](https://modrinth.com/user/duplexsystem)
4. [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [Malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811)
5. [Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lmd) by [Frikinjay](https://modrinth.com/user/frikinjay)
6. [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3)
7. [MemoryLeakFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) by [FX](https://modrinth.com/user/FX) & [Contaria](https://modrinth.com/user/contaria)
8. [modernfix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) by [embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/user/embeddedt)
9. [noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) by [Steveplays](https://modrinth.com/user/Steveplays)

Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50) & [sfPlayer1](https://modrinth.com/user/sfPlayer1)
- [Almanac](https://modrinth.com/mod/almanac-lib) by [frikinjay](https://modrinth.com/user/frikinjay)

## I DO NOT OWN ANY OF THIS MODS, ALL RIGHTS TO THEY OWN DEVELOPERS!!
